zh.Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金

zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Oliphant於大約1313年出生在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林時，他的父親William Oliphant Lord of Aberdalgie45歲，母親Isabel Douglas39歲。他和Elizabeth de Bruce至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1378年10月20日在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾達爾吉享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Oliphant于大约1313年出生在苏格兰費伏登福姆林时，他的父亲William Oliphant Lord of Aberdalgie45岁，母亲Isabel Douglas39岁。他和Elizabeth de Bruce至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1378年10月20日在苏格兰培爾阿爾達爾吉享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Oliphant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London) and Scottish (Fife): from Old French olifard or olifant, of uncertain meaning. It has been suggested that this might be a derivative of Old French olif ‘olive’ + the pejorative suffix -ard ‘derisive nickname for one who preferred an olive branch to more martial weapons’; it may have denoted a man twisted like an olive-tree. The variant Olifant may have resulted from the substitution in Old Norman French of the sequence l-r by l-n, leading to a false association with Old French olifant ‘elephant’. This heraldic beast appears in the Scottish family's coats of arms. Branches of the Anglo-Norman family owned lands in both England and Scotland. The surname is now chiefly Scottish.
English: possibly a topographic name from residence at an inn known as the Olyphaunt or ‘elephant’, though whether this gave rise to a hereditary surname is unknown.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Oliphant was born about 1313, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, his father, William Oliphant Lord of Aberdalgie, was 45 and his mother, Isabel Douglas, was 39. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth de Bruce. He died on 20 October 1378, in Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Oliphant est né environ 1313, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, son père, William Oliphant Lord of Aberdalgie, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Isabel Douglas, avait 39 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth de Bruce. Il est décédé le 20 octobre 1378, à Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Oliphant um 1313 in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Oliphant Lord of Aberdalgie 45 und seine Mutter Isabel Douglas 39. Er hatte mit Elizabeth de Bruce mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Oktober 1378 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Oliphant è nato il circa 1313 nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, William Oliphant Lord of Aberdalgie, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Douglas, aveva 39 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Elizabeth de Bruce. Morì il 20 ottobre 1378, nel Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Oliphantが約1313年にスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで生まれた時，父William Oliphant Lord of Aberdalgieは45歳，母Isabel Douglasは39歳であった。彼はElizabeth de Bruceとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1378年10月20日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーダルジで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Oliphant(이)가 대략 1313년 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Oliphant Lord of Aberdalgie(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Douglas(은)는 39세였다. 그는 Elizabeth de Bruce(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1378년 10월 20일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압르다기에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Oliphant nasceu aproximadamente 1313, em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, William Oliphant Lord of Aberdalgie, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Douglas, tinha 39 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Elizabeth de Bruce. Ele faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1378, em Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Oliphant родился около 1313 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Oliphant Lord of Aberdalgie было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Douglas, 39. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Elizabeth de Bruce. Он умер 20 октября 1378 г. в местности абирдалги, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Oliphant nació aproximadamente 1313, en Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, su papá, William Oliphant Lord of Aberdalgie, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Isabel Douglas, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Elizabeth de Bruce. Murió el 20 de octubre de 1378, en Aberdalgie, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 66 años.
